description: Use this API to get transformer logical extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr, lval = get_ext_transformer_logical(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, string)
python_syntax: ierr, lval = get_ext_transformer_logical(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension transformer field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘LVAL’ not returned.
Unknown error with data access; ‘LVAL’ not returned.
API Prereqs not met; ‘LVAL’ not returned.
